αὐτοῦ.gloss: of him, his; of it, its

λόγος.gloss: word, reason, rational principle; the Logos

καθὼς.gloss: just as, even as, according as

θεοποιηθῶμεν.gloss: we might be made God, we might be divinized

ἐρωτῶ.gloss: I ask, I pray, I request

γνωρίσω.gloss: I will make known, I will reveal
